key_items: Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed chair with traders forecasting rate hikes in 2026, limiting monetary easing tailwinds
Bitcoin sold off to $76,000 with bears reclaiming control; technical resistance at upper trendline suppressing bullish momentum
Mixed institutional signals: Tether expanding Bitcoin holdings offset by Trump Media selling 2,650 BTC and Mark Cuban dumping holdings
reasoning: Bitcoin faces conflicting forces with institutional adoption accelerating but macroeconomic headwinds intensifying under new Fed leadership signaling no rate cuts in 2026. Technical breakdown below $80,000 combined with major holder liquidations (Trump Media, Mark Cuban) and bearish Kalshi prediction markets (0% probability of $100K by year-end) suggest consolidation rather than directional conviction over the swing trading window.
risks: Bitcoin monthly Bollinger Bands at tightest ever levels combined with upper trendline resistance breakdown could trigger accelerated deleveraging and test $60,000 support if negative macro catalysts emerge around Fed policy clarification.
